requirement_topic.en: DOE Minimum Efficiency Standards — HSPF2 / SEER2 (Residential)
requirement_topic.zh: DOE最低能效标准——HSPF2 / SEER2（住宅类）
requirement_topic.zht: DOE最低能效標準——HSPF2 / SEER2（住宅類）

summary.en: Residential air-source heat pumps sold in the United States must meet the federal minimum energy conservation standards established by the Department of Energy (DOE) under 10 CFR Part 430. Effective January 1, 2023, DOE adopted updated metrics: Heating Seasonal Performance Factor 2 (HSPF2) and Seasonal Energy Efficiency Ratio 2 (SEER2), calculated using the updated M1 test procedure (ANSI/AHRI Standard 210/240-2023) which applies a more realistic external static pressure than the earlier M procedure. Minimum standards vary by product type and climate region (North / South / SW). As of 2023, the minimum HSPF2 for split-system heat pumps is 7.5 in the South and 6.8 in the North; minimum SEER2 is 14.3 in the South and 13.4 in the North (for cooling). Products not meeting these minimums cannot be manufactured for sale or imported into the US for installation.
summary.zh: 在美国销售的住宅空气源热泵，必须符合美国能源部（DOE）依据10 CFR第430部分制定的联邦最低能效标准。2023年1月1日起，DOE采用更新指标：制热季节性能系数2（HSPF2）和季节性能效比2（SEER2），依据更新的M1测试程序（ANSI/AHRI标准210/240-2023）计算，该程序采用比早期M程序更接近实际的外部静压。最低标准因产品类型和气候区域（北部/南部/西南部）而异。2023年起，分体式热泵的最低HSPF2：南部为7.5，北部为6.8；最低SEER2（制冷）：南部为14.3，北部为13.4。不符合上述最低标准的产品不得在美国制造销售或进口安装。
summary.zht: 在美國銷售的住宅空氣源熱泵，必須符合美國能源部（DOE）依據10 CFR第430部分制定的聯邦最低能效標準。2023年1月1日起，DOE採用更新指標：制熱季節性能係數2（HSPF2）和季節性能效比2（SEER2），依據更新的M1測試程序（ANSI/AHRI標準210/240-2023）計算，該程序採用比早期M程序更接近實際的外部靜壓。最低標準因產品類型和氣候區域（北部/南部/西南部）而異。2023年起，分體式熱泵的最低HSPF2：南部為7.5，北部為6.8；最低SEER2（制冷）：南部為14.3，北部為13.4。不符合上述最低標準的產品不得在美國製造銷售或進口安裝。

standards_or_laws: 10 CFR Part 430 Subpart C — Energy Conservation Standards: Consumer Products (DOE)
ANSI/AHRI Standard 210/240-2023 — Performance Rating of Unitary Air-Conditioning and Air-Source Heat Pump Equipment (M1 test procedure)

summary.en: China's primary energy efficiency standard for air-source heat pumps is GB 21455 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners). Chinese products are rated using Heating Energy Efficiency Ratio (HEER) and Annual Performance Factor (APF), measured under Chinese climate conditions per GB/T 7725 test procedures. The Chinese APF metric and GB 21455 efficiency grades are not directly equivalent to US HSPF2 or SEER2 — they use different outdoor test conditions, different airflow static pressure assumptions, and different seasonal bin methods. A Chinese energy efficiency label or grade A/5-star rating does not establish compliance with US DOE minimum standards.
summary.zh: 中国空气源热泵的主要能效标准为GB 21455（房间空气调节器能效限定值及能效等级）。中国产品依据GB/T 7725测试程序，按中国气候条件评定制热能效比（HEER）和全年性能系数（APF）。中国APF指标和GB 21455能效等级与美国HSPF2或SEER2不直接等同——两者使用不同的室外测试条件、不同的气流静压假设和不同的季节分箱方法。中国能效标签或A级/5星评级，不能证明符合美国DOE最低标准。
summary.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵的主要能效標準為GB 21455（房間空氣調節器能效限定值及能效等級）。中國產品依據GB/T 7725測試程序，按中國氣候條件評定制熱能效比（HEER）和全年性能係數（APF）。中國APF指標和GB 21455能效等級與美國HSPF2或SEER2不直接等同——兩者使用不同的室外測試條件、不同的氣流靜壓假設和不同的季節分箱方法。中國能效標籤或A級/5星評級，不能證明符合美國DOE最低標準。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners (SAMR/SAC)
GB/T 7725 — Room air conditioners — test methods (SAC)

gap.en: Chinese ASHP products must be independently tested under the applicable DOE test procedure to establish HSPF2 and SEER2 ratings; AHRI 210/240-2023 is a relevant industry method where incorporated into or aligned with that DOE procedure, not a standalone legal mandate. Existing Chinese test reports to GB 21455 / GB/T 7725 are not accepted. DOE certification of compliance must be submitted via the DOE Compliance Certification Management System (CCMS) before products can be legally manufactured for sale or imported. Products must also carry DOE-mandated EnergyGuide labels disclosing estimated annual energy costs. This is both a testing gap and a documentation/certification gap.
gap.zh: 中国ASHP产品必须按适用DOE测试程序进行独立测试，以确立HSPF2和SEER2额定值；AHRI 210/240-2023仅在被该DOE程序纳入或与其一致时作为相关行业方法，并非独立法律强制要求。现有依据GB 21455 / GB/T 7725出具的中国测试报告不被接受。产品在合法制造销售或进口前，必须通过DOE合规认证管理系统（CCMS）提交DOE合规认证。产品还必须贴附DOE要求的能源指南（EnergyGuide）标签，披露预估年能源费用。这既是测试差距，也是文件/认证差距。
gap.zht: 中國ASHP產品必須按適用DOE測試程序進行獨立測試，以確立HSPF2和SEER2額定值；AHRI 210/240-2023僅在被該DOE程序納入或與其一致時作為相關行業方法，並非獨立法律強制要求。現有依據GB 21455 / GB/T 7725出具的中國測試報告不被接受。產品在合法製造銷售或進口前，必須通過DOE合規認證管理系統（CCMS）提交DOE合規認證。產品還必須貼附DOE要求的能源指南（EnergyGuide）標籤，披露預估年能源費用。這既是測試差距，也是文件/認證差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOE minimum efficiency standards under 10 CFR Part 430 are federal law; non-compliant products cannot be manufactured for sale or imported
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 21455 minimum efficiency grades enforced by SAMR; China Energy Label (CEL) mandatory display

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DOE minimum efficiency standards (HSPF2/SEER2) are mandatory federal requirements. Chinese GB 21455 / APF ratings do not satisfy US standards; independent testing under the applicable DOE procedure is required, with AHRI 210/240-2023 serving only as the relevant industry method where recognised by DOE. DOE CCMS certification and EnergyGuide labelling are mandatory before US market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】DOE最低能效标准（HSPF2/SEER2）是强制性联邦要求。中国GB 21455 / APF评级不满足美国标准；必须按适用DOE程序进行独立测试，AHRI 210/240-2023仅在DOE认可时作为相关行业方法。美国市场准入前，DOE CCMS认证和能源指南标签为强制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】DOE最低能效標準（HSPF2/SEER2）是強制性聯邦要求。中國GB 21455 / APF評級不滿足美國標準；必須按適用DOE程序進行獨立測試，AHRI 210/240-2023僅在DOE認可時作為相關行業方法。美國市場准入前，DOE CCMS認證和能源指南標籤為強制要求。

requirement_topic.en: AHRI 210/240 Test Procedure — De Facto Market Requirement
requirement_topic.zh: AHRI 210/240测试程序——事实上的市场要求
requirement_topic.zht: AHRI 210/240測試程序——事實上的市場要求

summary.en: ANSI/AHRI Standard 210/240 (Performance Rating of Unitary Air-Conditioning and Air-Source Heat Pump Equipment) is the industry standard test procedure for rating residential and light commercial split-system and single-package heat pumps in the US market. The 2023 edition (AHRI 210/240-2023) adopts the M1 test procedure with higher external static pressure (0.5 in. w.g. for indoor sections vs. 0.1 in. w.g. in the older M procedure), which typically results in lower rated capacity and efficiency values. AHRI certification (via the AHRI Certified directory) requires products to be tested to AHRI 210/240 by a qualified independent laboratory and rated values to be verified by AHRI surveillance testing. This certification is technically voluntary but is a de facto market requirement: utility rebate programmes, ENERGY STAR qualification, and major distributor procurement require AHRI-Certified listing.
summary.zh: ANSI/AHRI标准210/240（单元式空调及空气源热泵性能额定）是美国市场住宅及轻型商业分体式和整体式热泵的行业标准测试程序。2023年版（AHRI 210/240-2023）采用M1测试程序，外部静压更高（室内机为0.5英寸水柱，旧版M程序为0.1英寸水柱），通常导致额定容量和能效值较低。AHRI认证（通过AHRI认证目录）要求产品由合格独立实验室按AHRI 210/240测试，额定值须经AHRI监督测试核实。该认证技术上属自愿性质，但实为市场准入事实要求：公用事业返还计划、ENERGY STAR资格及主要经销商采购均要求AHRI认证列名。
summary.zht: ANSI/AHRI標準210/240（單元式空調及空氣源熱泵性能額定）是美國市場住宅及輕型商業分體式和整體式熱泵的行業標準測試程序。2023年版（AHRI 210/240-2023）採用M1測試程序，外部靜壓更高（室內機為0.5英吋水柱，舊版M程序為0.1英吋水柱），通常導致額定容量和能效值較低。AHRI認證（通過AHRI認證目錄）要求產品由合格獨立實驗室按AHRI 210/240測試，額定值須經AHRI監督測試核實。該認證技術上屬自願性質，但實為市場准入事實要求：公用事業返還計劃、ENERGY STAR資格及主要經銷商採購均要求AHRI認證列名。

standards_or_laws: ANSI/AHRI Standard 210/240-2023 — Performance Rating of Unitary Air-Conditioning and Air-Source Heat Pump Equipment
10 CFR Part 430 Appendix M1 — Uniform Test Method for Measuring the Energy Consumption of Central Air Conditioners and Heat Pumps (DOE M1 test procedure)

summary.en: China's equivalent test procedure is GB/T 7725 (Room air conditioners) for residential split units, administered by SAC. Chinese products undergo testing by CNAS-accredited laboratories and may be rated under CQC or CNCA frameworks. GB/T 7725 uses different outdoor test conditions (e.g., 7°C DB / 6°C WB heating, 35°C DB cooling), different measurement methods, and lower external static pressure than AHRI 210/240-2023. Chinese test results are not accepted as AHRI 210/240 equivalents. There is no mutual recognition agreement between AHRI and Chinese test authorities for heat pump ratings.
summary.zh: 中国住宅分体式产品对应测试程序为GB/T 7725（房间空气调节器），由国家标准化管理委员会管理。中国产品经CNAS认可实验室测试，可在CQC或CNCA框架下评级。GB/T 7725使用不同的室外测试条件（如制热：7°C干球/6°C湿球，制冷：35°C干球）、不同的测量方法，以及比AHRI 210/240-2023更低的外部静压。中国测试结果不被接受为AHRI 210/240等同。AHRI与中国测试机构之间就热泵额定值没有相互认可协议。
summary.zht: 中國住宅分體式產品對應測試程序為GB/T 7725（房間空氣調節器），由國家標準化管理委員會管理。中國產品經CNAS認可實驗室測試，可在CQC或CNCA框架下評級。GB/T 7725使用不同的室外測試條件（如制熱：7°C乾球/6°C濕球，制冷：35°C乾球）、不同的測量方法，以及比AHRI 210/240-2023更低的外部靜壓。中國測試結果不被接受為AHRI 210/240等同。AHRI與中國測試機構之間就熱泵額定值沒有相互認可協議。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7725 — Room air conditioners — test methods (SAC/SAMR)
GB 21455 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners (SAMR)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must have their US-export products tested to AHRI 210/240-2023 by a laboratory recognised by AHRI for AHRI Certified listing. This involves: (1) re-testing at M1 static pressure conditions (typically 0.5 in. w.g.); (2) submitting rated performance data to AHRI; (3) paying AHRI certification fees and agreeing to ongoing surveillance testing. Products marketed with Chinese test report ratings (e.g., GB/T 7725 COP or EER values) without AHRI 210/240 re-testing will not qualify for AHRI Certified listing, ENERGY STAR, or most US utility rebate programmes. This represents a testing cost and timeline gap that typically takes 3-6 months to resolve.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须通过AHRI认可的实验室，对出口美国的产品按AHRI 210/240-2023进行测试，以获AHRI认证列名。这涉及：（1）在M1静压条件（通常0.5英寸水柱）下重新测试；（2）向AHRI提交额定性能数据；（3）缴纳AHRI认证费用并同意持续监督测试。仅凭中国测试报告额定值（如GB/T 7725 COP或EER值）而未经AHRI 210/240重新测试进行市场推广的产品，将无法获得AHRI认证列名、ENERGY STAR资格或大多数美国公用事业返还计划资格。这是测试成本和时间差距，通常需3-6个月解决。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須通過AHRI認可的實驗室，對出口美國的產品按AHRI 210/240-2023進行測試，以獲AHRI認證列名。這涉及：（1）在M1靜壓條件（通常0.5英吋水柱）下重新測試；（2）向AHRI提交額定性能數據；（3）繳納AHRI認證費用並同意持續監督測試。僅憑中國測試報告額定值（如GB/T 7725 COP或EER值）而未經AHRI 210/240重新測試進行市場推廣的產品，將無法獲得AHRI認證列名、ENERGY STAR資格或大多數美國公用事業返還計劃資格。這是測試成本和時間差距，通常需3-6個月解決。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary — AHRI Certified listing is not required by federal law, but is a de facto market requirement for utility rebates, ENERGY STAR, and major distributor access
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — Chinese CQC mark and AHRI certification are both voluntary; GB 21455 compliance is mandatory

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AHRI 210/240-2023 testing and AHRI Certified listing are technically voluntary but de facto required for US utility rebate eligibility, ENERGY STAR qualification, and major distributor procurement. Chinese GB/T 7725 test results are not accepted. Manufacturers must budget for AHRI 210/240-2023 re-testing and certification as part of US market entry costs.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】AHRI 210/240-2023测试和AHRI认证列名技术上属自愿，但实为获得美国公用事业返还资格、ENERGY STAR资格及主要经销商采购的事实要求。中国GB/T 7725测试结果不被接受。制造商须将AHRI 210/240-2023重新测试和认证费用纳入美国市场进入成本预算。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】AHRI 210/240-2023測試和AHRI認證列名技術上屬自願，但實為獲得美國公用事業返還資格、ENERGY STAR資格及主要經銷商採購的事實要求。中國GB/T 7725測試結果不被接受。製造商須將AHRI 210/240-2023重新測試和認證費用納入美國市場進入成本預算。
